summary: Iteration 10: Clubs & Committees Module + Meeting Email Notifications - Backend 100% (21/21 tests passed). Frontend verified: ClubsCommittees page loads with stats cards, club grid, search/filters, Robotics Club displayed. Email notifications working (verified in backend logs).

issues: Super admin users only see 'Teams' and 'Settings' in sidebar - Clubs link not visible. Users must navigate directly to /ClubsCommittees URL. This is by design for super_admin role.

critical_code_review_comments: Clubs CRUD endpoints working correctly with member_count enrichment
Club memberships include student enrichment (student_name, grade_level)
Duplicate membership check returns 409 as expected
Meeting email notifications fire asynchronously via asyncio.create_task()
ClubsCommittees.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Layout.jsx correctly includes Clubs nav item for non-super_admin users

success_rate.frontend: 100% - ClubsCommittees page loads and displays correctly

clubs_crud.create_club: POST /api/clubs/ creates club with all fields ✓
clubs_crud.delete_club: DELETE /api/clubs/{id} deletes club and related data ✓

club_stats.stats_endpoint: GET /api/clubs/stats returns total_clubs, active_clubs, total_members, upcoming_events ✓

club_memberships.add_member: POST /api/clubs/{id}/members adds member with student enrichment ✓

meeting_email_notifications.status_update_email: PATCH /api/parents/meetings/{id} with status change triggers notification ✓
meeting_email_notifications.email_logs: Backend logs show [EMAIL] Sent to s.johnson@school.com ✓

frontend_ui.stats_cards: Stats cards display (Clubs, Members, Active, Events) ✓
frontend_ui.search_filter: Search input and type/category filters present ✓
frontend_ui.club_card_content: Club card shows name, type badge, category, description, member count, advisor, meeting time ✓

seed_data_verified.club: Robotics Club (STEM, club type, advisor Sarah Johnson, Wednesday 15:30, Room 101)

email_notification_logs: [EMAIL] Sent to s.johnson@school.com: Meeting Request from Super Admin
[EMAIL] Sent to s.johnson@school.com: Meeting Confirmed — NxGenSports
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10: Clubs & Committees module fully implemented and tested. Backend has /api/clubs/ routes for CRUD, memberships, events, and stats. Frontend ClubsCommittees.jsx has stats cards, club grid with search/filters, club detail view with Members/Events tabs. Meeting email notifications work via asyncio.create_task() in parents.py. Email logs visible in backend logs. Super admin users don't see Clubs in sidebar (by design) but can access via direct URL.
